principle: Keep every event handler under 200ms by breaking long JavaScript tasks — a blocked main thread causes every tap and click to feel sluggish
explanation: X.perf|inp_optimization: INP<200ms_good; long_task(>50ms_main_thread)->blocks_input; fixes: (1)break_long_tasks: scheduler.yield()_OR_setTimeout(fn,0) (2)defer_non-critical_JS: requestIdleCallback (3)heavy_work->Web_Worker (4)code_split+lazy_load: reduce_JS_parse+compile (5)avoid_heavy_listeners_on_scroll+resize; NO:long_synchronous_loops_in_click_handlers NO:blocking_main_thread_with_analytics; eg: 500ms_click_handler >> broken_into_3x50ms_chunks_with_yield -> INP_passes

principle: Preload critical fonts and use font-display optional for zero layout shift — font-swap causes text reflow that directly degrades CLS
explanation: X.perf|font_loading_cls: FOUT(font-display:swap)->reflow->CLS_penalty; best_for_CLS: font-display:optional->uses_fallback_if_font_not_ready(zero_reflow); preload: <link_rel=preload_as=font_crossorigin>_in_<head>; tune_fallback: ascent-override+descent-override+size-adjust; NO:no_font-display_set NO:preloading_all_font_weights; eg: @font-face{font-display:swap} >> @font-face{font-display:optional}+<link_rel=preload_as=font>

principle: Achieve Time to First Byte under 800ms by serving cached HTML from the edge — TTFB is the hard ceiling for LCP and every millisecond of server delay delays every other metric
explanation: X.perf|ttfb_optimization: TTFB==time_from_request_to_first_HTML_byte; good:<0.8s; TTFB_is_ceiling_for_LCP; fixes: (1)CDN_with_edge_nodes (2)full_HTML_cache_at_CDN (3)stale-while-revalidate_headers (4)DB_query_optimization (5)server_region_near_users; static_sites: TTFB_50-100ms_from_CDN; NO:dynamic_render_with_no_cache NO:single_origin_server_far_from_users; eg: TTFB_2.1s_single_server >> TTFB_0.15s_CDN_cached_HTML

principle: Load every third-party script with a facade or defer strategy — analytics, chat widgets and ad pixels at page load are the most common INP and LCP killers
explanation: X.perf|third_party_scripts: analytics+chat+ads+pixels+AB_tests; each_script->parse+execute_on_main_thread->INP+LCP_penalty; strategies: (1)defer:<script_defer> (2)async:<script_async> (3)facade:static_placeholder->real_widget_on_interaction (4)load_after_first_gesture:requestIdleCallback; NO:render_blocking_scripts_in_<head> NO:chat_widget_loading_at_page_load; eg: embedded_YouTube_full_load >> lite-youtube_facade->loads_real_player_on_click

principle: Apply maximum E-E-A-T signals to YMYL pages — Google raters score health, finance and legal content with zero tolerance for missing credentials or unverifiable claims
explanation: X.seo|ymyl_standards: YMYL: health+finance+legal+safety; rater_standard: highest_scrutiny; required: (1)author_credentials_per_claim (2)medical/legal_reviewer_credited (3)sources_cited_with_links (4)last_reviewed_date_visible (5)affiliate_disclosure_if_applicable; unverifiable_claim->low_quality_rating->ranking_suppressed; NO:medical_advice_without_doctor_byline NO:finance_content_anonymous; eg: "lower_blood_pressure"+no_author >> same+MD_byline+reviewed_date+cited_sources

principle: Show the last-updated date on every article and keep it accurate in schema — Google uses dateModified for freshness scoring and raters penalize stale undated content
explanation: X.seo|content_freshness: Google_freshness: prefers_recently_updated_for_time-sensitive_queries; visible: "Updated_April_2025"_in_byline; schema: Article{datePublished+dateModified}; update_trigger: new_data+dead_links+outdated_stats+changed_regulations; NO:changing_dateModified_without_real_content_update(Google_detects) NO:removing_date_to_appear_evergreen NO:only_datePublished_without_dateModified; eg: article_no_date >> article+"Updated_April_2025"+schema:dateModified

principle: Cite authoritative external sources with outbound links — linking to primary research and official documentation is an E-E-A-T trust signal, not an SEO risk
explanation: X.seo|outbound_authority_links: myth:external_links_lose_pagerank; reality:linking_authoritative_sources->trust_signal_for_raters; raters_check: does_page_cite_reliable_sources?; pattern: data_claim->original_study; medical_claim->PubMed/WHO; definition->official_source; rel=nofollow_for:sponsored+UGC NOT_for_editorial_citations; NO:zero_outbound_links_on_research_content NO:only_linking_own_pages; eg: "studies_show_X"_no_link >> "studies_show_X [link_to_PubMed]"

principle: Build a factual About page and link it from every footer — Google raters check About pages to verify site ownership and author credentials before rating content quality
explanation: X.seo|about_page_eeat: raters_check_about_page: who_runs_site+credentials+purpose; required_sections: (1)real_names+roles (2)credentials+qualifications (3)contact:email+address (4)editorial_policy:how_content_reviewed; link_from:footer_sitewide; YMYL:include_medical/legal_advisor_names; NO:about_page_marketing_copy_only NO:not_linked_from_footer NO:anonymous_YMYL_site; eg: "about_us_generic_marketing" >> "about_us:team_names+credentials+contact+editorial_standards"
